phrases.english: My mother is a doctor and she is very kind.
phrases.pronunciation: Ummi tabeebah wa hiya lateefah jiddan.
phrases.context: Use this to describe your mother's profession and personality.

phrases.english: My father works in a bank and he is very smart.
phrases.arabic: أبي يعمل في بنك وهو ذكي جدًا.
phrases.pronunciation: Abi ya'mal fi bank wa huwa zakiyy jiddan.
phrases.context: Use this to talk about your father's job and intelligence.

phrases.english: I have one brother and two sisters, and we are very close.
phrases.arabic: لدي أخ واحد وأختان، ونحن مقربون جدًا.
phrases.pronunciation: Ladaiy akh wahid wa ukhtan, wa nahnu muqarriboon jiddan.
phrases.context: Use this to explain your sibling situation and family bond.

phrases.english: My grandmother loves to cook traditional food.
phrases.context: Use this to share a hobby or skill of your grandmother.

phrases.english: My cousin is getting married next month.
phrases.context: Use this to share news about a family member's upcoming event.
